ddls:
CREATE TABLE "arrests" (
  "arrest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each arrest */,
  "arrest_date" TEXT /* Date of the arrest */,
  "weekday" INTEGER /* Day of the week (0-6) the arrest occurred */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month (1-12) the arrest occurred */,
  "crime_severity" INTEGER /* Severity of the crime (0-2) */,
  "boro" INTEGER /* Borough where the arrest occurred */,
  "precinct" INTEGER /* Precinct where the arrest occurred */,
  "age_group" INTEGER /* Age group of the perpetrator (0-2) */,
  "perp_sex" INTEGER /* Sex of the perpetrator (0-1) */,
  "perp_race" INTEGER /* Race of the perpetrator (0-5) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the arrest location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the arrest location */,
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the crime type */,
  "perp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the perpetrator */,
  "arresting_officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the arresting officer */,
  "arrest_location" TEXT /* Detailed description of the arrest location */,
  "arrest_time" TEXT /* Time of the arrest */,
  "case_status" TEXT /* Current status of the case (e.g., open, closed, under investigation) */,
  "arrest_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the arrest (e.g., witness statement, confession) */,
  "arrest_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the arrest */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("arrest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_arrests_perp_id FOREIGN KEY ("perp_id") REFERENCES perpetrators ("perp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_arrests_boro FOREIGN KEY ("boro") REFERENCES boroughs ("boro_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_arrests_crime_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_id") REFERENCES crimes ("crime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_arrests_precinct FOREIGN KEY ("precinct") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "boroughs" (
  "boro_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each borough */,
  "boro_name" TEXT /* Name of the borough */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the borough */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the borough in square kilometers */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Crime rate per 100,000 residents */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the borough data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("boro_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "precincts" (
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each precinct */,
  "precinct_name" TEXT /* Name of the precinct */,
  "boro_id" INTEGER /* Borough the precinct belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the precinct */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the precinct in square kilometers */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Crime rate per 100,000 residents */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the precinct data was last updated */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the precinct (e.g., phone number, email) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_precincts_boro_id FOREIGN KEY ("boro_id") REFERENCES boroughs ("boro_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crimes" (
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime */,
  "crime_type" TEXT /* Type of crime (e.g., theft, assault) */,
  "crime_severity" INTEGER /* Severity of the crime (0-2) */,
  "crime_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the crime */,
  "legal_code" TEXT /* Legal code or statute associated with the crime */,
  "penalty" TEXT /* Typical penalty for the crime */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the crime data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "perpetrators" (
  "perp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each perpetrator */,
  "age_group" INTEGER /* Age group of the perpetrator (0-2) */,
  "perp_sex" INTEGER /* Sex of the perpetrator (0-1) */,
  "perp_race" INTEGER /* Race of the perpetrator (0-5) */,
  "perp_name" TEXT /* Name of the perpetrator */,
  "perp_dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the perpetrator */,
  "perp_address" TEXT /* Address of the perpetrator */,
  "perp_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the perpetrator */,
  "perp_email" TEXT /* Email address of the perpetrator */,
  "perp_photo" TEXT /* URL or path to a photo of the perpetrator */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the perpetrator data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("perp_id")
)
column_names: Day of the week (0-6) the arrest occurred
Unique identifier for the crime type
Unique identifier for the arresting officer
Detailed description of the arrest location
Current status of the case (e.g., open, closed, under investigation)
Reason for the arrest (e.g., witness statement, confession)
Additional notes or comments about the arrest
Area of the borough in square kilometers
Date when the borough data was last updated
Area of the precinct in square kilometers
Date when the precinct data was last updated
Contact information for the precinct (e.g., phone number, email)
Legal code or statute associated with the crime
Date when the crime data was last updated
Date of birth of the perpetrator
URL or path to a photo of the perpetrator
Date when the perpetrator data was last updated
